testcase.name: should reject channel creation without auth token
should reject channel creation with missing required fields
should submit a contact us message with valid data
should reject a message in the contact us with missing required fields
should reject a message in the contact us with invalid email format
should reject testimonial creation without auth token
should reject testimonial creation with empty body
should retrieve connection token with valid auth
should reject connection token request without auth
should reject invitation with invalid organisation ID
should update user profile with valid information or data type
should access endpoint with valid bearer token of the user
should return 401 if attempt to bypass login into a user account is sensed
should return 401 when anyone uses old/invalid tokens
should return profiles of users that are successfully registered
should return 400 if user profile that does not exist is searched
should return 400 if user profile is searched with letters instead of UUID
should allow users update status successfully
should reject attempt to update another user's status
should handle SQL injection in URL path safely
should register a new user with valid fields
should login with informations used to register
should reject user registering with an already-existing email
should reject user registering with missing required fields
should not allow users login with incorrect password
should not accept users logging in with unregistered email
should not accept registration with empty fields
should reject users trying to login with invalid email format (missing @)
should reject registration with extremely long email (300+ chars)
should reject passwords that exceeds the maximum required length
should accept if users use special characters/emoji as part of their username
should reject SQL injection in Login Password
should reject XSS payload in name field
should upload avatar image while user is logged in
should list all available avatar users can choose from
should reject avatar upload if user is logged out
should reject users uploading a non-image file (e.g. .txt) as an avatar
